emails.subject: PrimeTrade Agreement - Enron
emails.body: Sarah, The Financial trading group would like to enter into a a prime trading agreement with First Boston. They have an internet-based futures trading program which holds a certain amount of appeal for us and we would like to expedite the process of gaining access to this system. I wanted to let you know in advance and will forward the agreements as soon as I receive them. Sincerely, Darren Forwarded by Darren Delage/HOU/ECT on 07/11/2000 02:54 PM "Goss, Kathleen" <kathleen.goss@csfb.com> on 07/11/2000 02:48:37 PM

emails.subject: PrimeTrade Agreement - Enron
emails.body: Darren: Is Prime Trade for ENA or ECT Investments? Sheila: Would you please send an email to Ted? Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 07/21/2000 09:19 AM Darren Delage 07/12/2000 10:44 AM
